exam_format: Paper-based or computer-based at approved testing sites

testing_centers.notes: EPA-approved testing organization. Paper and computer-based exams.
Full list of approved testing organizations available on the EPA website. Not administered through Pearson VUE or Prometric. Exams may be paper-based or computer-based depending on organization.

id_requirements: Photo ID required at testing site. Requirements vary by testing organization.
exam_rules: Administered by EPA-approved testing organizations only — not Pearson VUE or Prometric. Exams may be paper-based or computer-based depending on testing organization. Candidates must pass each type section they attempt with a 70% or higher score. Universal certification requires passing Core plus all three Type sections.
renewal_options: EPA Section 608 certification does not expire. It is a lifetime certification. No renewal or continuing education is required by the EPA.

retake_policy.notes: Retake policy set by individual approved testing organizations. Contact your chosen testing org for specific retake rules and fees.

official_study_resources.title: EPA Section 608 Technician Certification — Official EPA Information
official_study_resources.notes: Free overview and regulatory requirements from the EPA.

official_study_resources.title: ESCO Institute EPA 608 Study Materials
official_study_resources.notes: Widely used prep materials; ESCO is an EPA-approved testing organization.
